meta.title: GEONYX | References – Completed Industrial Projects and Sites
meta.description: References and completed projects with GEONYX systems – industrial floors, chemical protection, water protection and thermal safety for heavy industry, food and pharma, logistics, energy and infrastructure. Long-term solutions for critical zones.

hero.description: NOT JUST PROMISES. ENGINEERING FACTS. See how GEONYX technologies transform critically compromised industrial substrates into indestructible monolithic systems.

slider.title: FROM RUIN TO MONOLITH
slider.instruction: DRAG TO SEE THE STRUCTURAL TRANSFORMATION

case1.title: INTENSIVE LIVESTOCK FARMING
case1.problem: Aggressive biogenic acid (pH < 3) and ammonia from manure had corroded standard concrete down to the rebar in less than 3 years. Compromised joints were generating pathogens.
case1.s1desc: Complete inertness to urine and lactic acid.
case1.s2desc: A pore-free, joint-free system eliminating biofilm development.
case1.s3desc: R12 profile texture providing hoof grip.
case1.result: Structural corrosion halted. The farm passes the strictest veterinary audits and trauma rates have been reduced to zero.

case2.title: HEAVY MACHINERY ENGINEERING
case2.problem: The concrete slab was saturated with hydraulic oils to a depth of 50 mm. Vibrations from 200-tonne presses and impact loading from falling metal components had turned the joints into craters.
case2.s1desc: Deep extraction of oils from concrete using specialist primers.
case2.s2desc: Application of a ductile geopolymer matrix (12 mm).
case2.s3desc: Elimination of all weak points across the floor.
case2.result: 5 years of operation under 24/7 vibrational loading. Zero volume loss.

case3.title: EXTREME CHEMICAL AGGRESSION
case3.problem: Production leaks of concentrated sulphuric acid (H₂SO₄ 98%) were destroying concrete within weeks. Conventional epoxy coatings swelled, delaminated and created the risk of an environmental catastrophe.
case3.s1desc: Complete inertness to concentrated acids and aggressive solvents.
case3.result: Production is secured against environmental fines. 100% surface containment of spills.

case4.title: HIGH-LOAD LOGISTICS HUB
case4.problem: Critical need to rehabilitate 2,000 m² of an active loading zone. Joints completely compromised by reach-truck traffic. Every minute of logistics downtime cost tens of thousands of euros.
case4.s1desc: Use of accelerators for extremely fast polymerisation (4–6 hours).
case4.s2desc: Work in sections without disrupting adjacent corridors.
case4.s3desc: Protection against the small, hard wheels of pallet trucks.
case4.result: The floor was milled and laid on Saturday evening. By Sunday morning (less than 12 hours later) forklifts were operating on the new surface.

cta.title: ANALYSE YOUR RISK.
cta.subtitle: Don't wait for a structural failure to stop your production. Request a technical assessment from our engineer.
